name: @karasu-tools/vscode-e2e
description: VS Code extension host smoke tests for the karasu extension

scripts.pretest: pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/core run build && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/i18n run build && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/lsp run build && pnpm --filter karasu-vscode run build && pnpm run build
